# README #

JSON configuration for the model transformation

* ucmis_mapping_configuration.schema.json - JSON Schema
* json-schema-for-humans_ucmis_mapping_configuration.schema.html - Documentation generated by json-schema-for-humans
* doc/oxygen - Documentation generated by Oxygen XML Editor (multiple pages)
* doc/oxygen_singlepage - Documentation generated by Oxygen XML Editor (single page)
* doc/xmlspy - Documentation generated by XMLSpy JSON and XML Editor (multiple pages)
* ddi-cdi2ddsc_mapping.json - Example JSON configuration for the model transformation from [DDI-CDI](https://ddialliance.org/ddi-cdi) to the [CDIF Data Description Profile](https://github.com/Cross-Domain-Interoperability-Framework/cdif-umlmodel/tree/main/ddsc).
